## Summary
What does this PR do? Why?

## Changes
- [ ] Feature: ...
- [ ] Bugfix: ...
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup: ...
- [ ] Docs: ...

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests (`pytest` / etc.)
- [ ] Manual test steps:
  - Step 1: ...
  - Step 2: ...

## Evals (EDD)
- [ ] Ran PR subset eval (`make eval-pr` / `python backend/evals/...`)
- [ ] Updated eval datasets/rubrics/configs (if needed)
- [ ] (Optional) Requested `run-full-eval` label / triggered AWS full suite
- [ ] Attached / linked eval report (CI artifact / S3 run URL): `...`

## Risk
- [ ] Low (docs / comments / formatting)
- [ ] Medium (logic changes, no prompt/rubric changes)
- [ ] High (prompt/rubric/model/scoring changes, agent behavior changes)

## Screenshots (if UI)
<!-- Optional -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Code builds without errors
- [ ] Tests added/updated if needed
- [ ] No console errors / obvious warnings
- [ ] Sensitive keys/secrets not committed
